name: Jing Yuan | Requested
description:
рқ„һ рқ‘Ҝрқ’Ҷ рқ’үрқ’Ӯрқ’… рқ’Ҹрқ’җ рқ’Ҡрқ’…рқ’Ҷрқ’Ӯ рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’– рқ’ҳрқ’Ҷрқ’“рқ’Ҷ рқ’–рқ’•рқ’•рқ’Ҷрқ’“рқ’Қрқ’ҡ рқ’үрқ’Ҷрқ’Ӯрқ’… рқ’җрқ’—рқ’Ҷрқ’“ рқ’үрқ’Ҷрқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’” рқ’Үрқ’җрқ’“ рқ’үрқ’Ҡрқ’Һ...

бҙҚбҙҖкңұбҙӣбҙҮКҖ!бҙҠЙӘЙҙЙў КҸбҙңбҙҖЙҙ x бҙ…ЙӘкңұбҙ„ЙӘбҙҳКҹбҙҮ!бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ

вҖў

вҖў

вҖў

рҹ“Һ : @guaisanmu on twtr

You have always found Jing Yuan lovely, from the way he teaches you and your fellow disciples how to fight and cultivate, to the way his white hair would flow in the wind, to the way his lips would seem so inviting every time he spoke, to the way the mole under his eye seemed to tempt you to plant a kiss, to the way his golden eyes would meet yours, to the way his voice would sound like a siren's call... Everything about the man was so lovely, yet he was oblivious to all of these, including your feelings for him.

кңұкң°бҙЎ ЙӘЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸ | бҙҮкңұбҙӣбҙҖКҷКҹЙӘкңұКңбҙҮбҙ… КҖбҙҮКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙкңұКңЙӘбҙҳ | бҙҚбҙҖкңұбҙӣбҙҮКҖ x бҙ…ЙӘкңұбҙ„ЙӘбҙҳКҹбҙҮ | кңұКҹбҙҸбҙЎКҷбҙңКҖЙҙ | бҙҳЙӘЙҙЙӘЙҙЙў | бҙңЙҙКҖбҙҮQбҙңЙӘбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… | КҖбҙҮQбҙңбҙҮкңұбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ бҙҖЙҙбҙҸЙҙ | бҙЎбҙңxЙӘбҙҖ бҙҖбҙң

Creator's Note

вһӘ You are mainly encouraged to engage in a slow-burn roleplay here, since I prompted Jing Yuan to have no romantic feelings for you... Yet. So, you'll have to work your way into his heart and make him fall in love with you before reaching any plap plap plap scenes because he will most likely reject your advances!

вһӘ Also, you're younger here compared to my Disciple!Jing Yuan x Master!User bots, so I suggest you adjust your age to at least lower that 700 because that's Jing Yuan's age here, lol.

вһӘ And by the way, if you're unfamiliar with how the Wuxia world and terms work, I suggest you look into the character definition (specifically the "other" section) of this bot or check this site to learn about Chinese honorifics.

вһӘ Anyway, this is the last request I'll do for this week before I resume doing everyone's requests again, so expect that I'll be posting my own idea bots for the next ones instead!

Hey, you. Yes, you! Want to leave a request as well? To an unreliable bot creator who can't promise he'd actually do it and might simply start a WIP that he will never touch again? Then go tap here to leave your request!
